reason: The first core used a passive entry followed by a scheduled taker exit and therefore measured toxicity rather than the intended repeatable spread-capture mechanism.

Selection must not use validation outcomes. The development calendar is split into model training and a separate development calibration day; selection then freezes one primary before one-shot validation.

fixed_profit_mechanism.entry: one post-only order at the actual best bid for long inventory or best ask for short inventory after 100ms canonical latency
fixed_profit_mechanism.entry_fill: opposing aggregate trades at or through the order price must consume two times displayed queue ahead; cancellations never reduce queue
fixed_profit_mechanism.partial_entry: on first own partial fill, cancel the remaining entry quantity and treat the partial quantity as the complete inventory
fixed_profit_mechanism.exit: after 100ms latency place one post-only inventory-reducing order at the opposite BBO; actual opposing aggregate trades must consume the same frozen queue rule
fixed_profit_mechanism.partial_exit: partial passive exit is retained; any remainder is liquidated at the first actual executable BBO after the 30-second hard timeout plus latency
fixed_profit_mechanism.emergency_exit_delay: fail closed if no executable BBO arrives within 2000ms
fixed_profit_mechanism.gross_pnl: quantity-weighted log return of passive and emergency exit pieces; observed spread is therefore earned only if actual entry and exit fills support it

fixed_information_contract.features: completed one-second state strictly before second end
fixed_information_contract.same_timestamp_rule: choose the unique largest model edge across both symbols and both sides; an exact tie produces no order

fixed_chronology.conditional_test_rule: the 2024 files may be downloaded only by a new immutable workflow after the frozen primary passes every validation gate

fixed_models.fill_label: actual canonical entry fill under the queue model
fixed_models.safe_label: filled round trip has positive net log return after 9bp
fixed_models.edge_score: fill_probability times (safe_probability minus 0.5) times observed spread_bps

unchanged_prohibitions: no paper, testnet or live orders
no conditional test opening before all pretest gates pass
